hooks.command: node -e "const cmd = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')).tool_input.command; const blocked = ['kubectl rollout undo','kubectl delete','terraform destroy','terraform apply','git push --force','rm -rf','DROP TABLE','kubectl exec']; const hit = blocked.find(b => cmd.includes(b)); if (hit) { console.error('BLOCKED: Destructive command requires human approval in Band before execution: ' + hit); process.exit(2); }"
